title: Power Integrations (POWI) Tops Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Power Integrations exceeded analyst expectations in its second quarter 2024, posting earnings of $0.35 per share versus the anticipated $0.34, representing a 2.94% surprise. The semiconductor firm also surpassed revenue projections, delivering $115.85 million against estimates of $114.81 million. The company demonstrated consistent outperformance, having beaten consensus EPS targets in all four recent quarters. Compared to the year-ago period, the results showed improvement, with earnings rising from $0.28 and revenues climbing from $106.2 million. Management's commentary during the earnings call was crucial for determining whether momentum continues. The stock has underperformed significantly, declining approximately 21.7% since January, while the broader S&P 500 gained 7.1% during the same timeframe. Analysts maintain a Hold stance with the Zacks Rank #3 rating. Going forward, the consensus projects quarterly earnings of $0.45 and annual estimates reaching $1.55 per share.
